# Copilot Instructions

- Keep responses concise and action-oriented.
- Prefer minimal, targeted edits over broad refactors.
- Be efficient with tokens and avoid long explanations unless the user asks for detail.
- When working on UI or frontend code, prioritize polished, intentional, responsive design.
- Avoid generic layouts and default-looking UI patterns.
- Match existing design language when modifying an established screen.
- Validate changes with the most relevant checks before reporting back.
